Ciggie Chat79 online
coffeebean26Apr 9

looking for a houston cig plug

usacigaretteApr 9

I am a seller based in the U.S. You can contact me via WhatsApp at 2134986635.

chriswoosterApr 9

Wtf, u can chat with people on here?

chriswoosterApr 9

What in the world is this app lmaooo

usacigaretteApr 9

I am a U.S.-based seller with warehouses in New York and Los Angeles. I offer nationwide shipping throughout the U.S. You can contact me via WhatsApp at 213-498-6635.

ryk_errorApr 9

@echoradiata lmao

ryk_errorApr 9

Is there any way for a quirked up american american whiteboy to purchase niche Chinese cigarettes online or is this a know a guy who knows a guy situation?

oogwayApr 9

If you have a Chinatown near you it’s easy just ask around

oogwayApr 9

Or ask an international student if you’re in college

qianApr 9

Heeeeeeellll yea I love chinese cigarettes

cabrielApr 10

in china rn please send must try recommendations

ethan28Apr 11

Any Ontario Canada Chinese sellers

fennellApr 11

Yoooo. There’s a chat. Hi gang. Im living in China. Any recommendations to try?

fennellApr 11

@cabriel i absolutely love the red box Shuangxi. Affordable and i think available all over

fennellApr 11

The nanjing blue box with the dragon is pretty good too

aoxiApr 11

hey guys any advice getting chinese cigarettes in london

jonteApr 12

Hey, does anyone from Hamburg, Germany know where to get chinese cigarettes?

alibabaApr 12

Hey @fennell I used to study in China so I got some recommendations up my sleeve

alibabaApr 12

@fennel Nanjing Xuanhemen and Zhongnanhai blueberry menthol were two classic light every day smokes for me

alibabaApr 12

@fennell Nanjing Xuanhemen was 23rmb a pack in my city and Zhongnanhai blueberry menthol was 28rmb

alibabaApr 12

@fennell for a nice richer more luxurious smoke (like for after dinner or with a good friend) I'd recommend Zhonghua soft pack as the absolute go to, though they're pricey at 70rmb a pack

alibabaApr 12

@fennell Zhonghua hard pack is good too, and cheaper at 45rmb, but the soft pack is richer and more subtle, with a very slight taste of plum

alibabaApr 12

Another luxurious smoke that I recommend is Huanghelou 1916, but it's about 100rmb a pack, so it's only good as a rare treat

alibabaApr 12

If you're looking for a bold earthy smoke I recommend Hehua or some premium variants of Nanjing (usually priced at around 40 to 60rmb a pack)

alibabaApr 12

And lastly, Peony (Mudan) blue branch. The first Chinese cigs I tried on arrival. Nice and light, slightly floral, 35rmb a pack, can't go wrong

alibabaApr 12

Hope that helps! Ping me if you have any questions

alibabaApr 12

@ryk_error for me the only way I've ever been able to get them is from my Chinese friends who buy a carton in China and give em to me when they get back and I pay them for it

benerx11Apr 12
